action_set_definitions.name: search_suppliers
action_set_definitions.description: Search for suppliers based on specific attributes like status, audit failure reasons, or keywords.

search_query.description: The search term or criteria (e.g., 'failed thermal mapping audit', 'pending status').

action_set_definitions.name: get_audit_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the historical audit logs and performance metrics for a specific supplier.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier for the supplier.

audit_entries.notes: Failed initial mapping; corrective actions submitted.

action_set_definitions.name: get_evaluation_criteria
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current weights and scoring logic for supplier evaluation.

action_set_definitions.name: update_supplier_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a supplier's record with a new evaluation cycle, score, and designation.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier for the supplier.

designation.description: The status based on compliance thresholds.

updated_metrics.description: The metrics used for this update.

state_description.suppliers: A collection of supplier records indexed by unique Supplier IDs.
state_description.evaluation_criteria: The weights assigned to different performance categories (e.g., quality, delivery, cost) used for final score calculation.
state_description.evaluation_cycle: The current time period or round of scoring (e.g., '2023_Q4').
state_description.audit_logs: A record of all modifications made to scores during the current session.

audit_logs.details: Failed seasonal thermal mapping for Dublin-Dubai lane; PQ reports missing for summer extremes.
CAPA accepted. New summer PQ reports validated. Update Quality_Score to 88 and Delivery_Score to 84 based on thermal duration capacity results.
Maintained high performance across all lanes.
